context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Film Pipeline casting proposals use unified card format with avatar, genres, agency_name, skill toggle (FilmPipeline.jsx lines 964-1002). 2) Serie TV market view shows unified cards with 'Agenzia:' text and 'Mostra Skill' toggle (22 toggles found). 3) Release card modal implemented in SeriesTVPipeline.jsx (lines 792-867) and AnimePipeline.jsx (lines 616-680) showing quality, total_revenue, audience_rating, audience_comments. 4) Backend available-actors endpoint returns agency_name and strong_genres_names. Note: Existing completed series don't have release card data (audience_comments, total_revenue, audience_rating) because they were completed before the feature was added - new releases will have this data.
